context: Tests whether the agent implements the correct three-table schema with proper constraints, stores monetary values in cents, uses deterministic SHA-256 hashing with prefixed keys for assignment, and implements sticky bucketing to ensure session consistency.

checklist.name: Three tables present
checklist.description: Schema defines exactly three tables: one for experiments, one for variants, one for assignments

checklist.name: Status constraint
checklist.description: Experiments table has a CHECK constraint limiting status to the lifecycle values ('draft', 'running', 'paused', 'concluded')

checklist.name: Prices in cents
checklist.description: Variant price column is stored as INTEGER (not DECIMAL or FLOAT), and revenue column is BIGINT — both representing cents

checklist.name: Assignments composite PK
checklist.description: Assignments table uses a composite PRIMARY KEY on (session_id, experiment_id), not a separate surrogate key

checklist.name: Traffic split constraint
checklist.description: Schema or code comments indicate that variant traffic_split values must sum to 100 for an experiment

checklist.name: SHA-256 for traffic hash
checklist.description: assignVariant uses crypto.createHash('sha256') to compute the traffic bucket hash (not Math.random or other methods)

checklist.name: Prefixed hash keys
checklist.description: Uses distinct prefixed strings for traffic hash ('traffic:...') and variant selection hash ('variant:...') to produce independent random values

checklist.name: Sticky bucketing check
checklist.description: assignVariant checks for an existing assignment record before computing any hash, and returns the previously assigned variant if found

checklist.name: Assignment persisted
checklist.description: After selecting a new variant, the assignment is inserted into the assignments table before returning

checklist.name: Running status guard
checklist.description: assignVariant returns null (no assignment) if the experiment status is not 'running'

checklist.name: Traffic pct guard
checklist.description: Sessions whose traffic hash falls at or above traffic_pct are excluded from the experiment (return null)

checklist.name: Impression tracking
checklist.description: getExperimentPrice increments the impression counter atomically using a SQL UPDATE with += 1, not a read-modify-write
